name: jobops-ic
description: Independent contractor toolkit - services, client prospecting, pitch decks, proposals, rate cards, landing pages. Requires jobops.

interface.shortDescription: Independent contractor services, prospecting, proposals, rate cards, and landing pages
interface.longDescription: Use JobOps IC with the core JobOps workspace to define services, find clients, create pitch decks, draft consulting proposals, publish rate cards, and build landing-page copy and pages.
defaultPrompt: Use JobOps IC to define consulting services.
Use JobOps IC to build a rate card.
Use JobOps IC to draft a client proposal.
